text.title: Research Repository Setup Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Research Repository Setup methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: score-platforms
step.action: Score >=3 platforms on API maturity, AI tagging, integrations, cost/user, ZDR.

step.name: wire-ingestion
step.action: Connect Otter / Looppanel / Intercom / PostHog via API; verify idempotency.

step.name: backfill-90d
step.action: Pull last 90 days + tag with AI through ZDR endpoint.
step.decision-gate: Refuse backfill if ZDR not configured.
